scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.ai-gateway-user
scopes.description: Standard user access to the AI Gateway

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.ai-gateway-admin
scopes.description: Admin access to the AI Gateway (manage virtual keys, view spend)

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.ai-gateway-readonly
scopes.description: Read-only access to model list and usage stats

attributes.name: ResourceGroup
attributes.description: SAP AI Core Resource Group for tenant isolation

role-templates.name: AIGatewayUser
role-templates.description: Standard user who can invoke LLM models via the gateway

role-templates.name: AIGatewayAdmin
role-templates.description: Administrator who can manage the gateway (virtual keys, teams, spend)

role-templates.name: AIGatewayReadOnly
role-templates.description: Read-only access for monitoring and reporting

role-collections.name: AI Gateway User
role-collections.description: Use the LiteLLM AI Gateway to call LLM models
